metadata.name: Issue Form W-2 to an Employee

description: At year-end, a business needs to prepare and issue a Form W-2 to one of its employees.

nodes.task_description: Compile the employee's total wages, tips, and other compensation for the year.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent gathers all payroll data for the employee.

nodes.task_description: Compile the total amounts withheld for federal income tax, Social Security, and Medicare.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent gathers all tax withholding data.

nodes.task_description: Prepare the Form W-2 with all the compiled information and provide it to the employee.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent generates an accurate Form W-2.
